---
title: "You should add a descriptive title here"
author: "Your Name Here"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Overview

This script uses data ... description of the project, data source, etc ... to ... description of what it does ...

File Created:\
yyyy-mm-dd your name here

Revisions:\
yyyy-mm-dd your name and description of major revisions here ... add lines as needed

## Preparation Steps

```{r}
#| label: load-packages

library(tidyverse)
# add other packages here (note that any "install.packages" calls should not be made in the console and not on the script as we don't want to install something on someone else's computer.)

```

```{r}
#| label: set-Dropbox-environment

```

```{r}
#| label: read-in-data

```
